# init(tensor:)

**Initializer**

Creates a tensor parameter with the tensor you specify.

## Declaration

```swift
convenience init(tensor: MLCTensor)
```

## Parameters

- **tensor**: The underlying tensor.

## Creating Tensor Parameters

- **init(tensor:optimizerData:)**: Creates a tensor parameter with the tensor and optimizer data you specify.

items.description: Creates a tensor parameter with the tensor and optimizer data you specify.
items.name: init(tensor:optimizerData:)
